2604.28123.title: PRISM: Pre-alignment via Black-box On-policy Distillation for Multimodal Reinforcement Learning
2604.28123.paper_summary: The standard post-training recipe for large multimodal models (LMMs) applies supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on curated demonstrations followed by reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR). However, SFT introduces distributional drift that neither preserves the model's original capabilities nor faithfully matches the supervision distribution. This problem is further amplified in multimodal reasoning, where perception errors and reasoning failures follow distinct drift patterns that compound during subsequent RL. We introduce PRISM, a three-stage pipeline that mitigates this drift by inserting an explicit distribution-alignment stage between SFT and RLVR. Building on the principle of on-policy distillation (OPD), PRISM casts alignment as a black-box, response-level adversarial game between the policy and a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) discriminator with dedicated perception and reasoning experts, providing disentangled corrective signals that steer the policy toward the supervision distribution without requiring access to teacher logits. While 1.26M public demonstrations suffice for broad SFT initialization, distribution alignment demands higher-fidelity supervision; we therefore curate 113K additional demonstrations from Gemini 3 Flash, featuring dense visual grounding and step-by-step reasoning on the hardest unsolved problems. Experiments on Qwen3-VL show that PRISM consistently improves downstream RLVR performance across multiple RL algorithms (GRPO, DAPO, GSPO) and diverse multimodal benchmarks, improving average accuracy by +4.4 and +6.0 points over the SFT-to-RLVR baseline on 4B and 8B, respectively. Our code, data, and model checkpoints are publicly available at https://github.com/XIAO4579/PRISM.
2604.28123.paper_summary_zh: 大型多模態模型（LMMs）的標準後訓練流程是在精心挑選的示範上應用監督微調（SFT），然後進行可驗證獎勵的強化學習（RLVR）。然而，SFT 引入了分佈漂移，這既無法保留模型的原始能力，也無法忠實匹配監督分佈。這個問題在多模態推理中進一步加劇，因為感知錯誤和推理失敗遵循不同的漂移模式，並在隨後的 RL 中相互疊加。我們提出了 PRISM，一個三階段的流程，通過在 SFT 和 RLVR 之間插入一個明確的分佈對齊階段來減輕這種漂移。基於策略內蒸餾（OPD）的原則，PRISM 將對齊視為一個黑箱、響應級別的對抗遊戲，該遊戲在策略和一個具有專門感知和推理專家的混合專家（MoE）鑑別器之間進行，提供解耦的修正信號，指導策略朝向監督分佈，而無需訪問教師的 logits。雖然 1.26M 的公共示範足以進行廣泛的 SFT 初始化，但分佈對齊需要更高保真的監督；因此，我們從 Gemini 3 Flash 精心挑選了 113K 額外的示範，這些示範具有密集的視覺基礎和針對最困難未解決問題的逐步推理。在 Qwen3-VL 上的實驗顯示，PRISM 在多個 RL 算法（GRPO、DAPO、GSPO）和多樣的多模態基準上始終提高下游 RLVR 的性能，分別在 4B 和 8B 上比 SFT 到 RLVR 的基線平均準確率提高了 +4.4 和 +6.0 分。我們的代碼、數據和模型檢查點可在 https://github.com/XIAO4579/PRISM 上公開獲取。
2604.28123.author: Sudong Wang et.al.
2604.28123.authors: Sudong Wang, Weiquan Huang, Xiaomin Yu, Zuhao Yang, Hehai Lin, Keming Wu, Chaojun Xiao, Chen Chen, Wenxuan Wang, Beier Zhu, Yunjian Zhang, Chengwei Qin
